taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Full Stack Engineer
core_skills: Full stack application development, React, Angular, C#, NET
skill_match_scores: Full stack application development:0.0, React:1.0, Angular:1.0, C#:0.0, NET:0.0
must_have_quals: 4+ years of experience in full stack application development using React or Angular and .NET or Node/TypeScript, Proficiency in C# and .NET, Proficiency with Microsoft Azure and cloud-native application development, Experience building and consuming RESTful services and microservices architectures, Knowledge of Microsoft Azure AI and integration of AI capabilities into applications, Experience with Azure services such as Web Apps, Logic Apps, Containers, Functions, API Management, and monitoring tools, Familiarity with SQL Server and Azure SQL, Strong skills in JavaScript, jQuery, and TypeScript, Experience with front-end frameworks such as Angular, React.js, or Node.js, Understanding of DevOps tools and practices, including Git and Azure DevOps
core_responsibilities: Develop and maintain secure front-end and back-end application components, Build user-facing web interfaces using React or similar frameworks and backend services using .NET or Node, Ensure seamless integration of AI solutions into applications and workflows, Integrate Microsoft Graph APIs and related enterprise services, Implement authentication and authorization using Entra ID, OAuth, and role-based access controls, Optimize application performance, reliability, scalability, and observability, Support AI-powered applications and integrations that enable Copilot extensibility and custom solutions
job_summary: GEI Consultants, Inc. is focused on solving some of the world’s pressing problems, and they are seeking a Full Stack Engineer to develop and maintain AI-powered applications. This role involves building user-facing components and backend services, ensuring seamless integration and performance of AI-enabled solutions.
